providers.name: pleo
providers.notes: Pleo migrated from Greenhouse to Ashby. Uses the public Ashby Job Board API; no auth or query params required.

providers.name: greenhouse-unity
providers.notes: Disabled 2026-07-05: the Greenhouse board token 'unity3d' now 404s (all token variants tried). Unity moved ATS; re-enable with the correct board/endpoint if found.

providers.name: adzuna-dk
providers.notes: Adzuna is a general-purpose job aggregator with Danish coverage (free plan, ~250 searches/day). Setup needs both an app_id and an app_key from https://developer.adzuna.com. Two-key configuration isn't supported from this page yet — leave this off until that's wired up.

providers.name: jobnet
providers.notes: Jobnet is the Danish public employment service's job site. They no longer offer free automated access — using it now requires a paid agreement with the STAR agency (spoc@star.dk). Leave this off unless you have arranged access.

providers.name: jobindex
providers.notes: Jobindex doesn't allow automated access. To include its listings, run a search on jobindex.dk in your browser, export the results, and save the CSV in your data/imports/ folder named jobindex-*.csv. The file needs these columns: title, company, location, url, description, posted_at.

providers.name: linkedin
providers.notes: LinkedIn requires a logged-in account and gates its API behind the partner-only Talent Solutions program, so it can't be queried automatically. To include LinkedIn listings: set up LinkedIn job-alert emails for your searches, then save the roles you care about as a CSV in your data/imports/ folder named linkedin-<anything>.csv (e.g. linkedin-2026-06.csv). Required columns: url, title. Optional: company, location, description, posted_at (ISO date). Headers are case-insensitive. Turn this provider on and the next search run ingests every linkedin-*.csv file.

providers.name: generic-rss-example
providers.notes: Example template — not a real job source. Used as a starting point when adding a new RSS provider.

providers.name: html-example
providers.notes: Example template — not a real job source. Used as a starting point when adding a new web-scraped provider.

providers.name: jobindex-rss-softwareudvikler
providers.notes: Jobindex public RSS, AND-query for the Danish term 'softwareudvikler'. Returns ~20 most-recent DK Software Developer listings across every DK ATS that syndicates to Jobindex (Emply, HR-Manager.net, TeamTailor, SmartRecruiters, internal sites). Body enrichment on so the linked page's full text is used for ranking. Confirmed working — 5 of the user's 8 curated example employers appear here when run together with the .NET variant below.

providers.name: jobindex-rss-net-udvikler
providers.notes: Jobindex public RSS, AND-query requiring both '.net' and 'udvikler' (Danish for developer). Tighter than the broader 'softwareudvikler' query above — surfaces specifically .NET-tagged DK developer roles. Catches Sundhed.dk, Dansk Sundhedssikring, Sopra Steria, Netcompany Architect, etc. that the softwareudvikler query may not.

providers.name: it-jobbank-rss
providers.notes: IT-jobbank public RSS — same backend as Jobindex but pre-filtered to IT roles. AND-query for 'softwareudvikler' (replaces the old 'developer' query which returned generic IT-support / infrastructure noise). Body enrichment on.

providers.name: jobsearch-dk
providers.notes: Jobsearch.dk's public RSS feed is NOT a real job feed — it returns generic category index pages (Receptionist, Tjener, Maler etc.), not specific openings. Confirmed broken on 2026-05-11 (100 fetched, 0 useful matches). Left in the catalog as a no-op disabled provider so we don't re-enable it by mistake.

providers.name: careerjet-dk
providers.notes: Careerjet covers job listings across Denmark. To use it, sign up for a free affiliate ID at https://www.careerjet.com/partners/api, paste it in the Affiliate ID field below, then turn the provider on. Each search pulls up to 500 listings.

providers.name: jooble
providers.notes: Jooble is a global job aggregator with Danish coverage. To use it, get a free API key at https://jooble.org/api/about, paste it in the API key field below, then turn the provider on. Each search pulls up to 250 listings.

providers.name: recruit-it
providers.notes: A small Danish IT recruitment agency with a few dozen open roles at any time. The actual hiring company is shown inside each job title (e.g. 'IT-chef til 3F').

providers.name: stepstone-dk
providers.notes: Stepstone doesn't offer a public feed. To include its listings, run a search on stepstone.dk in your browser, export the results, and save the CSV in your data/imports/ folder named stepstone-*.csv. The file needs these columns: title, company, location, url, description, posted_at.

providers.name: smartrecruiters-soprasteria
providers.notes: SmartRecruiters public Postings API filtered to DK. List endpoint only — description isn't included; ranker sees title + location + company. Sopra Steria mostly hires .NET / Java consultants; ~5 DK roles at any time.

providers.name: smartrecruiters-netcompany
providers.notes: Largest DK consultancy; ~47 DK roles at any time. Mix of Software Engineer / Senior Consultant / banking-domain titles. The non-engineering title gate filters out the Manager / HR / Finance roles automatically.

providers.name: smartrecruiters-deloitte-nordic
providers.notes: Big-4 Nordic tech consultancy; ~15 DK roles. Most are audit/finance — the title gate de-ranks those — but occasional engineering/cloud architect roles surface.

providers.name: smartrecruiters-devoteam
providers.notes: DK cloud / data engineering consultancy; ~8 DK roles. Cloud and data-focused, but most postings are senior IC engineering.

providers.name: hr-manager-change
providers.notes: CHANGE of Scandinavia (lingerie / fashion) on HR-Manager.net. The list page server-renders a hidden 'PositionList' JSON with all 30+ open positions across DK / SE / NO retail + Farum HQ; the adapter parses it and follows AdvertisementUrl per listing for the full body.

providers.name: hr-manager-dr
providers.notes: Danmarks Radio (DR) on HR-Manager.net — public broadcaster's tech division (DR Teknologi at DR Byen, Copenhagen). Same JSON-list pattern as CHANGE; ~10 open positions at a time.

providers.name: teamtailor-danske-spil
providers.notes: Danske Spil's TeamTailor career site. The adapter parses sitemap.xml for job URLs, then extracts schema.org JobPosting JSON-LD from each page (title, description, datePosted, location). Same pattern works for any TeamTailor site without an API key.

providers.name: smartrecruiters-beumer
providers.notes: DK industrial automation; ~13 DK roles. Includes some software engineering roles around their conveyor / sortation control systems.

providers.name: jobindex-rss-backend-udvikler
providers.notes: Jobindex public RSS, AND-query requiring 'backend' and 'udvikler'. Catches Danish-titled backend roles (Nykredit, Norlys etc.) that the 'softwareudvikler' and '.net udvikler' queries miss. Verified 2026-06-12 (22 items). Body enrichment on.

providers.name: jobindex-rss-csharp
providers.notes: Jobindex public RSS, single AND-term 'c#'. Surfaces C#-tagged roles regardless of title language ('Software Engineer', 'Systemudvikler' etc.) that title-word queries miss; the '#' is URL-encoded automatically. Verified 2026-06-12 (20 items, incl. PFA and Arla .NET roles). Body enrichment on.

providers.name: jobindex-rss-azure
providers.notes: Jobindex public RSS, single AND-term 'azure'. Catches cloud/platform/DevOps roles built on the Azure stack that developer-title queries miss. Expect some infrastructure-only noise — the ranker's title gate and stack weights handle it. Verified 2026-06-12 (20 items). Body enrichment on.

providers.name: jobindex-rss-software-engineer
providers.notes: Jobindex public RSS, AND-query for the English title 'software engineer'. International companies hiring in Copenhagen post English titles the Danish queries never match. Verified 2026-06-12 (20 items). Body enrichment on.

providers.name: it-jobbank-rss-dotnet
providers.notes: IT-jobbank public RSS (same Jobindex backend, pre-filtered to IT roles), single AND-term '.net'. Complements the 'softwareudvikler' it-jobbank feed; cross-feed duplicates are collapsed by the deduper. Verified 2026-06-12 (9 items). Body enrichment on.

providers.name: techjob
providers.notes: Teknologiens Mediehus' tech job board (~400 DK engineering/IT roles; jobfinder.dk redirects here). No public jobs RSS or API, and robots.txt explicitly blocks AI crawlers, so automated ingestion is off the table. To include its listings: browse https://techjob.dk/jobs, copy the roles you care about into a CSV in your data/imports/ folder named techjob-<anything>.csv (e.g. techjob-2026-06.csv). Required columns: url, title. Optional: company, location, description, posted_at (ISO date). Headers are case-insensitive. Turn this provider on and the next search run ingests every techjob-*.csv file.

providers.name: workday-lego
providers.notes: LEGO's Workday career site via the public CXS JSON endpoint (POST, no auth). The list response has no description, so body enrichment fetches each job page and pulls the posting text from its embedded JSON-LD. postedOn is relative text, so the posting date stays unknown. searchText 'software' pre-filters ~40 global engineering roles (Billund-heavy); location ranking handles the rest. Some postings omit locationsText. Verified 2026-06-12.

providers.name: workday-simcorp
providers.notes: SimCorp's Workday career site via the public CXS JSON endpoint (POST, no auth). ~270 global roles unfiltered — searchText 'developer' narrows to engineering; Copenhagen HQ roles rank up via location. Body enrichment pulls each posting's text from the job page's embedded JSON-LD; no posting date (relative text only). Verified 2026-06-12.

providers.name: workday-maersk
providers.notes: Maersk's Workday career site via the public CXS JSON endpoint (POST, no auth). Site name is 'Maersk_Careers' — 'Maersk' alone 404s; the 6-job 'PT_Careers' side board is ignored. ~70 software roles globally, large Copenhagen tech hub. Body enrichment pulls each posting's text from the job page's embedded JSON-LD; no posting date (relative text only). Verified 2026-06-12.

providers.name: lever-h1
providers.notes: H1 (h1.co, healthcare-data platform) on Lever's public postings API — no auth, full plain-text descriptions inline. The response is a bare array, so no items_path. ~20 global roles incl. Copenhagen hybrid positions; createdAt is epoch millis which the date parser ignores, so the posting date stays unknown. Verified 2026-06-12.

providers.name: html-nordea
providers.notes: Nordea's SuccessFactors career site — the search page server-renders 100 openings per page (global; Copenhagen roles rank up via location). robots.txt permits the search and job pages. Body enrichment fetches each server-rendered job page for the full description. Verified 2026-06-12.

providers.name: html-pandora
providers.notes: Pandora Group's careers site (SuccessFactors behind a server-rendered list) — 10 openings per page across all functions; most tech roles sit in Copenhagen HQ. Body enrichment fetches each job page for the full description. Verified 2026-06-12. NOT paginated: the list is JS/XHR-loaded and the server-rendered fallback repeats the same 10 items for every ?page=N (confirmed 2026-07-05), so the adapter's no-new-items guard stops after page 1. Finding the underlying XHR jobs endpoint is the way to get the full list.

providers.name: html-pfa
providers.notes: PFA Pension's own job page, which server-renders the open positions (the underlying SuccessFactors ATS has no public API). All PFA roles are at the Copenhagen HQ, so location is set statically. robots.txt only disallows /soegning/. Body enrichment fetches each SuccessFactors job page for the full description. Verified 2026-06-12.

providers.name: oracle-danskebank
providers.notes: Danske Bank's Oracle Recruiting Cloud via the anonymous REST endpoint (no auth). The 'expand' param is required or the list comes back empty; requisitions sit at items[0].requisitionList (numeric path segments). ~145 open roles across DK/LT/IN — newest 100 fetched, location ranking sorts the rest. Real ISO posting dates. Body enrichment pulls description text from each job page. Verified 2026-06-12.

providers.name: teamtailor-twoday
providers.notes: twoday Denmark (large DK .NET/data consultancy, ex-NetCompany Group A/S sibling) on TeamTailor. Sitemap carried 22 open DK roles on 2026-06-12 — architects, DBAs, .NET consultants. Same sitemap + JSON-LD pattern as Danske Spil.

providers.name: teamtailor-templafy
providers.notes: Templafy (Copenhagen B2B SaaS, .NET/Azure stack) on TeamTailor. Few openings at a time (3 on 2026-06-12) but squarely in the user's market when they hire.

providers.name: oracle-milestone
providers.notes: Milestone Systems (Brøndby video-software house, big C#/.NET org) on Oracle Recruiting Cloud — same anonymous REST pattern as Danske Bank. ~25 open roles on 2026-06-12 incl. engineering squads. Body enrichment pulls description text from each job page.

providers.name: hr-manager-eg
providers.notes: EG A/S (major DK vertical-software house, heavy .NET) on HR-Manager.net — same PositionList JSON pattern as DR and CHANGE, addressed by customer=eg. ~60 open positions across DK/NO/SE on 2026-06-12.

providers.name: workday-stibo
providers.notes: Stibo Systems (Aarhus-HQ MDM software, .NET/Java) on Workday — same CXS pattern as LEGO/SimCorp/Maersk. Only ~15 roles globally so no searchText filter; location ranking handles the US offices. Body enrichment via job-page JSON-LD.

providers.name: workday-saxobank
providers.notes: Saxo Bank (Copenhagen trading tech, strong C#/.NET/SQL) on Workday CXS. ~79 roles globally (large Gurugram share); location ranking prunes non-DK. Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: nykredit-talentsoft
providers.notes: Nykredit koncern (incl. Spar Nord) via its own Talentsoft proxy — bare JSON array (no items_path, like Lever). All DK. Detail pages are JS-rendered so no body enrichment. Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: teamtailor-lunar
providers.notes: Lunar (DK/Nordic fintech, Aarhus/Copenhagen) on TeamTailor via vanity domain jobs.lunar.app. Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: html-jyskebank
providers.notes: Jyske Bank self-hosted SSR job list. Disabled 2026-07-06: the site returns 200 to a browser/curl but 403s the app's HTTP client (TLS-fingerprint/WAF bot protection) even with browser headers. Not bypassing anti-bot per policy — left as a manual candidate. Selectors kept for if the block is lifted.

providers.name: html-cbrain
providers.notes: cBrain (Copenhagen, F2 platform .NET) — Webflow server-rendered job cards; list item is the anchor (linkSelector :scope). Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: bamboohr-configit
providers.notes: Configit (Copenhagen, C#/.NET configuration software) on BambooHR — public careers/list JSON (items under 'result'). No inline description so body enrichment fetches each /careers/{id}. Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: teamtailor-e-conomic
providers.notes: Visma e-conomic (Copenhagen, .NET accounting SaaS) on TeamTailor via vanity domain career.e-conomic.com. Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: mjolner-rss
providers.notes: Mjølner Informatics (Aarhus/Silkeborg, C#/.NET & Azure consultancy). Its HR-Manager list.aspx (cid=1245) uses the newer template without the embedded PositionList JSON, so we use the HR-Manager RSS mirror instead — carries the real .NET/Azure roles. Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: teamtailor-bankdata
providers.notes: Bankdata (Fredericia banking IT, .NET/data) on TeamTailor. All DK. Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: hr-manager-bec
providers.notes: BEC Financial Technologies (Roskilde banking IT) on HR-Manager.net — ~24 roles (DK + some Warsaw). Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: greenhouse-solita
providers.notes: Solita (absorbed the Danish Commentor .NET team) on Greenhouse — Nordic-wide board, ~5-6 DK roles incl. Microsoft full-stack; location ranking prunes FI/SE. Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: html-systematic
providers.notes: Systematic (Aarhus, C#/.NET defence & health software) on a SuccessFactors 'go' career site — same tr.data-row markup as Nordea, server-rendered. This endpoint ignores the startrow cursor (returns the 10 newest regardless), so no pagination — it surfaces the 10 most-recent roles only. Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: html-nine
providers.notes: Nine (Copenhagen, Trifork group) — WordPress SSR job list with schema.org microdata; list item is the anchor (linkSelector :scope). Small; currently Java-heavy. Added 2026-07-06.

providers.name: teamtailor-trifork
providers.notes: Trifork group TeamTailor. Note: Trifork is federated (~69 units); this feed carries mostly group/UK corporate roles, not the Aarhus/Copenhagen .NET dev jobs — low DK yield. Added 2026-07-06.
